#### **FROM DARKNESS COMES LIGHT** The mass executions of the conspirators was not the end of the story. On 1stJune 1478, Pope Sixtus IV excommunicated Lorenzo. A little under three weeks later, he placed the city under interdict, forbidding mass and communion in Florence.
